steps.title: Use the past time marker
steps.content: The phrase "born in 1979 in Lilongwe" refers to one completed event at a specific past time. The verb must therefore be simple past.

steps.title: Reject present forms
steps.content: B uses present perfect, C uses simple present, and D uses present progressive. Each form conflicts with the completed past event described by "in 1979."

steps.title: Complete the past-tense clause
steps.content: Was is the simple past form that fits a completed birth event. The answer is A.
